mapper.insert: INSERT INTO gw_notifications (user_id, type, title, message, related_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{type}, #{title}, #{message}, #{relatedId})
mapper.update: UPDATE gw_notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE gw_notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM gw_notifications WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_read = FALSE
